data.body: ROOT CAUSE (confirmed + scoped): seeded _GITIGNORE omitted .ticket-write.lock and .graph-cache.json; the flock lock file is intentionally never unlinked on release, so both surface untracked. (.ticket-write.lock.d does NOT normally surface — it is rmdir'd on release — so the steady noise is just those two.) FIX (branch worktree-civil-marlin-flare, commit f3d81f94): derive _GITIGNORE from the WRITE_LOCK_NAME/MKDIR_LOCK_NAME/_GRAPH_CACHE_FILE constants (no drift); _commit_gitignore migrates existing trackers (idempotent), called from the already-initialized init path too. Pending PR/merge before close.
